$comment: Per-repo binding for the identifier-language gate (CANON-NAMING-CONVENTIONS-001 §8, surface-complete §8.6). Copy to tools/identifier-language.config.json. The engine is agnostic — THIS file holds every locale/layout fact: the declared language, the surfaces to scan, the DB column-type keywords, the admitted vocabulary, and documented exceptions. Bootstrap with `node tools/check-identifier-language.mjs --seed`, then REVIEW the diff (a non-declared-language token is a leak — RENAME it, do not admit it). schemaDirs = dirs of DDL .sql. slugSurfaces = dir trees whose child dir NAMES are identifiers (route slugs, feature dirs); recursive walks the tree, skip removes named subtrees, and `_*` / group `(..)` / param `[..]` folders are always excluded.
